meta.subject: Mathematics
meta.compliance: 零試題原文；只用公開評語／統計；facility_index 一律不虛構（§8）

data_provenance.public_qualitative: 官方及導師層面公開的《考生表現評論 / Comments on Candidates' Performance》與常犯錯誤（見 sources）。屬教學層面通則，非任何試卷原文。
data_provenance.public_statistics_available: HKEAA 免費公開的是【科目層級】成績等級分佈（Level distribution — Mathematics Compulsory Part）於 data.gov.hk 及 HKEAA 統計頁；並非逐課題得分率。
data_provenance.facility_index_note: 逐課題 facility index（得分率）僅載於【付費】的《Examination Report》，非免費公開來源。本檔一律標記為 null / not_publicly_disclosed，絕不虛構數字。若需真實逐課題數值，須由具備該付費報告的人手（David 考評監察）核入。
data_provenance.difficulty_tier_note: 任務定義 difficulty_tier 以 facility_index 界定（High <40% 等）。因缺公開 facility_index，本檔 difficulty_tier 亦標 null，改以 qualitative_difficulty（質性，基於公開評語）表達，並明確標示其非統計排名。

topics.qualitative_basis: 公開考生表現評論指出『對圖形擅自假設』類錯誤高發；非 facility-index 排名。
common_mistakes: 對圖形擅自假設：題目未說明，卻當作某線為直徑或切線
幾何證明理據不全、跳步，未逐步列明所用定理
common_mistakes_en: Making unstated assumptions from a diagram — treating a line as a diameter or tangent when it is not stated
Incomplete deductive proofs — skipping steps without citing the theorem used
topics.examiner_insights: 須嚴格按題目給定的條件推理，不得憑圖形外觀假設；幾何證明須逐步列明每步所依據的性質或定理。
topics.examiner_insights_en: Reason strictly from the stated conditions; do not assume from how a diagram looks. In deductive proofs, state the property or theorem used at each step.

topics.topic_zh: 方程與不等式（多部分跟進題）
topics.qualitative_basis: 公開評論指出考生常『漏答跟進小題』（如求得 x 範圍後未進一步求最大值）；非統計排名。
common_mistakes: 漏答跟進小題：求得未知數範圍後，未按要求進一步求最大／最小值
只完成第一部分便跳去下一題，忽略同題的後續要求
common_mistakes_en: Skipping follow-up parts — finding the range of x but not proceeding to the required maximum/minimum value
Answering only the first part and moving on, ignoring later requirements of the same question
topics.examiner_insights: 多部分題須逐一完成每個跟進要求；答完一部分先看清下一步要求（如『求最大值』）再作答。
topics.examiner_insights_en: Complete every follow-up requirement in multi-part questions; after each part, re-read the next instruction (e.g. 'find the maximum value') before moving on.

topics.qualitative_basis: 公開評論指出考生常『答案未化至最簡』；屬表達規範問題，非統計排名。
common_mistakes: 答案未化至最簡：分數未約簡、同類項未合併
表達不規範，影響最後一步得分
common_mistakes_en: Not simplifying to final form — fractions not reduced, like terms not combined
Non-standard presentation costing the final mark
topics.examiner_insights: 遞交前檢查答案是否已化至最簡（約簡分數、合併同類項），並確認表達規範。
topics.examiner_insights_en: Before submitting, check the answer is in simplest form (reduce fractions, combine like terms) and presented conventionally.
